did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a system using traditional image processing methods (weighted filter-smooth edge, thresholding for segmentation) and hand-crafted feature extraction (Local Binary Pattern, Grey Level Co-occurrence Matrix, HSV/RGB color channels) for melanoma classification. It does not employ machine learning, deep learning, or AI algorithms; the classification is based on extracted features rather than learned models.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
